home.title: Vietnam 5G Coverage Map
home.subtitle: Crowdsourced data from speed tests and outage reports. Pan the map to update the area.

outageBanner.stable: All carriers are operating normally nationwide.
outageBanner.title: National outages — last 6h

login.title: Sign in to NetMap VN
login.subtitle: Verify your phone number to appear on the leaderboard and link your devices.

speedtest.title: Speed test
speedtest.subtitle: Test your network speed at your current location. Results contribute to the coverage map.
speedtest.outOfVietnam: Location is outside Vietnam — not supported.
speedtest.carrierHint: 💡 Results reflect your CURRENT connection (cellular or WiFi ISP). The dropdown is just metadata.
speedtest.detectedNone: Could not detect carrier (private network, VPN, or unknown ISP).
speedtest.detectedHint: You can still pick manually below.
speedtest.mismatchWarning: ⚠️ You are connected via {detected} but selected {selected}. The result actually reflects {detected}, not {selected}.
speedtest.localhostWarning: ⚠️ Testing on localhost — results do NOT reflect real Internet speed because both client and server run on the same machine (loopback ~10 Gbps). Deploy the backend to a real server, or test from another device.

compare.title: Compare carriers
compare.subtitle: Crowdsourced data from speed tests and outage reports. Compare carrier quality by region.
compare.noData: No data for this filter (need at least 3 speed tests/carrier).
compare.footer: Scope: {province} · last {days} days · {network}. Reliability = 1 − (outages / tests). Need at least 3 tests/carrier to appear.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Community contributing network quality data. Only users who verified their phone appear here.
leaderboard.noDataHint: Be the first to contribute to the leaderboard!

me.title: Account
me.noTestsHint: Go to /speedtest to take your first.
me.noReportsHint: Go to /outages when you experience network issues.

badges.title: Badges
badges.subtitle: Contribute network quality data to unlock badges.

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. The NetMap team has been notified.
errors.offlineDesc: It looks like you're offline. Some features need a network connection. Check your Wi-Fi or mobile data.
errors.offlineCachedHint: You can still view recently visited pages from cache.

notifications.title: Outage notifications
notifications.subtitle: Get push notifications when there's a major outage near you (10km).
notifications.notSupported: Browser does not support push notifications.

outages.title: Outages near you
outages.outOfVietnam: Location is outside Vietnam — only supported in-country.
outages.reportFormTitle: Report an outage at your current location
outages.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. No signal since 2pm, whole area can't make calls
